Length (inches):34.25

Product features:

  • 【Large Storage Capacity】This storage unit features two spacious drawers and open cube shelves, perfect for organizing toys, small clothes, books, and more. The wide top surface provides extra space for lamps, photo frames, or decorative items.
  • 【Safe and Durable Design】Crafted from MDF board, this storage box is durable, easy to clean, and built to last. Its smooth, rounded edges are designed to prevent accidental scratches, ensuring safety during use.
  • 【Easy to Assemble】This storage unit comes with detailed instructions and all the necessary hardware, making assembly quick and hassle-free. Spend less time setting up and more time enjoying an organized space!
  • 【Dimensions Overall size】 31.5” W x 11.8” D x 24.2” H.

Graphic description

Kids Toy Storage Organizer with Large Drawers and Open Shelves, Removable Wheels, Safe Rounded Edges

This toy organizer with plenty of storage and an adorable look that’ll infuse great fun and vitality into kid’s room, playroom, or kindergarten. Constructed from MDF board, the toy chest is durable and stable for long-lasting use. This toy storage shelf can easily store and showcase kinds of belongings like toys, art supplies and more, making cluttered room neat and organized in a good manner. Each drawer is designed with flexible casters, allowing you to easily move to any position. This toy organizer is a great solution to teach kids organizational skills at an early age and keep stuff neatly stored away.

Drawers with Hidden Wheels

With large capacity of this children's toy storage cabinet, there is no need to worry about the mess at your home.

anti-tip device

This kids toy storage organizer includes an anti-tip device to securely anchor it to the wall, providing extra stability and ensuring safety for children during use.

Large Storage

With two spacious drawers and open cube shelves, this storage organizer offers ample space to store toys, books, clothes, and more, keeping your child’s room tidy and organized.
